The '''''Healing Star''''' was a hospital ship in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] during the [[Swarm War]]. Accompanying the ''[[Megador]]'' to [[Tenupe]] at the end of the war, it was staffed by only [[Droid/Legends|droids]], all part of a ruse by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to eliminate [[Lomi Plo]]. When she went after the ''Healing Star'', upon which she thought [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] were aboard, Luke Skywalker was able to cut her down with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
